task: Phase 6 Intelligence Panel overview cleanup and parcel focus marker scaling
overview_layout_changes: Overview now focuses on the selected parcel workflow instead of embedding the full countywide parcel and development panels.
Overview keeps the Selected Parcel card, Selected Parcel Development Activity panel, and Selected Parcel Permit Events panel.
Overview adds three compact headline cards: Total Parcels, Zoned Parcels, and Parcels With Permit Activity.
Full parcel metrics moved to the Parcel Intelligence section.
Full development activity metrics moved to the Development Activity section.
no_selected_parcel_behavior: Selected Parcel card continues to show the clean no-selection empty state.
Selected Parcel Development Activity now reports Waiting for parcel selection instead of Loading API when no parcel is selected.
Selected Parcel Permit Events now reports Waiting for parcel selection instead of Loading API when no parcel is selected.
Selected-parcel-specific development and permit event hooks do not call backend APIs when no official parcel ID is available.
timeout_and_fallback_handling: Selected-parcel panels use an explicit waiting source before a parcel is selected.
Overview headline cards do not render endpoint timeout details.
Detailed API/static/fallback messaging remains inside the relevant parcel, development, temporal, and selected-parcel panels.

parcel_focus_marker_scaling.approach: SceneView zoom-aware selected-parcel marker symbol profiles
parcel_focus_marker_scaling.zoomed_out_behavior: Marker remains larger and beacon-like for parcel discovery at wider camera zooms.
parcel_focus_marker_scaling.close_zoom_behavior: At zoom 17 and above the marker becomes a small translucent ring with no large sphere object so the selected parcel boundary remains visible.

smoke_test_notes: Interactive browser smoke testing was not run in this turn.
Static build validation confirms the dashboard compiles with the updated Overview, selected-parcel waiting states, and SceneView marker scaling.
remaining_ui_cleanup_opportunities: Run an in-browser pass to tune the close-zoom marker opacity against real parcel outlines.
Consider lazy-mounting inactive Intelligence Panel sections later so hidden sections do not initialize their panel hooks until selected.
